channel.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily
channel.description: A daily podcast covering the latest Tesla news, stock prices, and industry insights.
channel.ns1:author: Patrick
channel.ns1:subtitle: Your daily Tesla news and stock digest
channel.ns1:summary: Daily Tesla news digest and podcast covering the latest developments, stock updates, and market analysis.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time Daily - Episode 356 - December 17, 2025 at 09:19 AM PST
item.description: Daily Tesla news digest for December 17, 2025 at 09:19 AM PST. TSLA price: $477.25 -8.40 (-1.73%) . 1️⃣ **Tesla Stock Pops as Robotaxi Testing with No Safety Driver Confirmed: 15 December, 2025, 09:40 AM PST, Yahoo Finance**...
